touches.ai_summary: Initial LinkedIn outreach to Owen Scott introducing our platform's capabilities for sales-to-CS handoff automation. No response received.
Cold email sent to Owen Scott highlighting common pain points in post-sale handoffs for marketing agencies. No response received.
Follow-up LinkedIn message sharing case study of similar-sized agency reducing handoff time by 60%. No response received.
Cold email with personalized video addressing MapleAI's growth trajectory and scaling challenges. Owen responded expressing interest in learning more about automation capabilities.

questions_asked.question: Do you work with agencies our size?
questions_asked.answer: Yes, we have several enterprise agency clients with 5000+ employees using our platform for sales-to-CS workflows.

touches.ai_summary: Introduction email to Scarlett Okafor (COO) at Owen's request. Scarlett confirmed interest and suggested involving RevOps and Account Management teams.
Owen confirmed availability for discovery call and shared that MapleAI recently scaled to 7000+ employees, creating handoff bottlenecks between sales and CS teams.
next_steps: Discovery call scheduled for next week

touches.ai_summary: Pre-discovery email sent to Owen with agenda and preliminary questions about current handoff process, tools in use, and pain points.

12-minute discovery call with Owen Scott. Discussed current manual handoff process causing 3-5 day delays and information loss. Owen mentioned they're exploring solutions but no active evaluations yet.

questions_asked.question: What does your current sales-to-CS handoff process look like?
questions_asked.answer: Mostly manual email threads and spreadsheet updates. Takes 3-5 days and we lose context regularly.

questions_asked.question: How many customer accounts go through handoff monthly?
questions_asked.answer: About 40-50 new clients per month across our teams.

next_steps: Owen to gather metrics on handoff delays

touches.ai_summary: 19-minute follow-up call with Owen. He shared that handoff delays are causing customer satisfaction issues and executive team is prioritizing a solution. Discussed involving RevOps (Hazel) and Account Management (Dakota) in evaluation.

questions_asked.question: Can your platform integrate with our existing CRM and project management tools?
questions_asked.answer: Yes, we have native integrations with major CRMs and project management platforms, plus API access for custom workflows.

questions_asked.question: What's driving the urgency to solve this now?
questions_asked.answer: We lost two major clients last quarter partially due to poor onboarding handoffs. COO Scarlett made this a Q2 priority.

questions_asked.question: What kind of implementation timeline should we expect?
questions_asked.answer: Typically 4-6 weeks for organizations your size, including training and workflow customization.

next_steps: Owen to brief Hazel and Dakota

touches.ai_summary: Email confirming demo scheduled with Owen's team. Shared pre-demo questionnaire to understand technical requirements and use case priorities.

questions_asked.question: Which integrations are must-haves for your team?
questions_asked.answer: Salesforce, Asana, and Slack are critical. HubSpot would be nice to have.

touches.ai_summary: 31-minute technical evaluation with Hazel Williams (RevOps Analyst). Deep dive into data model, API capabilities, reporting, and security. Hazel asked detailed questions about data residency and compliance.

questions_asked.question: Where is customer data stored and do you support data residency requirements?
questions_asked.answer: Primary hosting in US with EU and Canada options available. SOC 2 Type II and GDPR compliant.

questions_asked.question: Can we customize automation rules per account segment?
questions_asked.answer: Yes, fully customizable rule engine with segment-based routing and escalation logic.

questions_asked.question: What's your current tech stack for workflow automation?
questions_asked.answer: Mix of Zapier, custom scripts, and manual processes. Looking to consolidate.

objections: Need to validate security requirements with InfoSec team

touches.ai_summary: 53-minute full demo with Owen Scott and team. Walked through end-to-end handoff automation, reporting dashboards, and ROI calculator. Team engaged positively, Owen asked about pricing models.

questions_asked.question: How is pricing structured - per seat or per account?
questions_asked.answer: Per seat pricing with tiered packages based on feature access. Also offer consulting add-on for custom workflow design.

questions_asked.question: What would success look like for you in the first 90 days?
questions_asked.answer: Reducing handoff time to under 24 hours and eliminating information loss between teams.

questions_asked.question: What level of ongoing support is included?
questions_asked.answer: Standard tier includes email support and knowledge base. Premium adds dedicated CSM and priority support.

next_steps: Owen to discuss internally with Scarlett

touches.ai_summary: 30-minute follow-up demo rescheduled from previous week. Dakota Wolf (Account Manager) joined to see workflow from AM perspective. Positive feedback on ease of use and time savings potential.

questions_asked.question: Can account managers track handoff status in real-time?
questions_asked.answer: Yes, dedicated dashboard shows all active handoffs with status updates and alerts for delays.

questions_asked.question: Dakota, what's your biggest pain point in the current process?
questions_asked.answer: Following up with CS team to confirm they have everything. Usually takes 4-5 emails per handoff.

next_steps: Owen to get budget approval from Scarlett

touches.ai_summary: 10-minute proposal call rescheduled from earlier in week. Reviewed pricing for 37 seats with automations plus consulting package. Owen confirmed budget range aligns and wants to involve Scarlett in next discussion.

questions_asked.question: What does the consulting package include?
questions_asked.answer: 20 hours of workflow design and implementation support, custom training sessions, and 30-day post-launch optimization.

next_steps: Prepare executive summary and ROI analysis

touches.ai_summary: 17-minute executive meeting with Scarlett Okafor (COO). Presented ROI analysis showing 18-month payback and $200K annual savings from efficiency gains. Scarlett asked about implementation risk and change management.

questions_asked.question: What's the biggest risk during implementation?
questions_asked.answer: User adoption is key. We mitigate with phased rollout, champion training, and embedded change management support.

questions_asked.question: What would make this a no-brainer decision for you?
questions_asked.answer: Confidence in the implementation timeline and proof that it won't disrupt current operations during rollout.

touches.ai_summary: 23-minute exec meeting with Scarlett. Reviewed implementation plan and spoke with two customer references. Scarlett now involving Willow Takahashi (RevOps, procurement) to start contract review. Asked about payment terms.

questions_asked.question: What are standard payment terms?
questions_asked.answer: Annual prepay is standard. We can accommodate quarterly billing for enterprise clients.

questions_asked.question: Is there flexibility on the seat count?
questions_asked.answer: Yes, we can start with a pilot group and scale up. Pricing adjusts based on final seat count.

objections: Need to confirm budget allocation across departments
next_steps: Owen and Scarlett to finalize seat count

touches.ai_summary: 43-minute exec meeting with Scarlett. Discussed contract terms, service level agreements, and data security provisions. Scarlett requested adjustment to payment terms and asked about volume discounts for future expansion.

questions_asked.question: Can we negotiate quarterly payment instead of annual prepay?
questions_asked.answer: We can offer quarterly billing with a small administrative fee, or waive the fee with a 3-year commitment.

questions_asked.question: If we expand to 50+ seats next year, how does pricing adjust?
questions_asked.answer: Volume discount kicks in at 50 seats - approximately 12% reduction in per-seat cost.

questions_asked.question: What's your preferred contract length?
questions_asked.answer: Ideally annual with option to expand. Want to see results before longer commitment.

objections: Annual prepay is challenging for our budget cycle
next_steps: Schedule negotiation call with Owen and Scarlett

touches.ai_summary: Email to Owen confirming revised proposal with quarterly billing option and updated seat count of 37. Included final pricing breakdown and implementation timeline.

37-minute negotiation call with Owen Scott, rescheduled from previous week. Finalized terms at $44,300 ACV for 37 seats with quarterly billing and consulting package. Owen confirmed internal approval and handed off to Willow for final contract execution.

questions_asked.question: Can we include an early termination clause after year one?
questions_asked.answer: We can include a 60-day notice termination option with prorated refund for unused quarters.

questions_asked.question: What's your target go-live date?
questions_asked.answer: Ideally within 6 weeks. Want this running before our Q3 planning cycle.

questions_asked.question: Will the consulting hours roll over if unused?
questions_asked.answer: Consulting hours are valid for 6 months from contract start. We can extend if needed based on project timeline.
